case_title: ARTHUR WEBB VS. THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, ARTHUR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-07-2010 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ARTHUR WEBB, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-04-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-20-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (212)
